shortDescription: Telegram Alerts + Vercel Pro + 9 Data Integrity Bugs Fixed
problem: No automatic error alerting in production. Multiple data integrity issues: project fields not saving, routing conflict crashing all API routes, storage price not editable, ownership table not populating, contact type switch leaving orphaned fields.
cause: Missing error monitoring infrastructure. Auto-save payloads incomplete. Form initialization bugs. Hardcoded empty arrays. Firestore .set() without merge.
filesChanged: src/components/projects/general-tab/GeneralProjectTab.tsx (5 fixes: description wipe, license fields, form init)
solution: 1. Production Telegram error monitoring (rate-limited, fire-and-forget). 2. Fixed routing conflict contacts/[id] vs [contactId] that crashed ALL serverless functions. 3. Fixed 5 project auto-save bugs. 4. Fixed contact type switch orphaned fields. 5. Fixed ownership table hardcoded empty buildingIds. 6. Fixed storage price edit. 7. Fixed 2 Firestore .set() without merge. 8. Added 4 delete cascade TODO markers. 9. Upgraded to Vercel Pro for build stability.
testing: Telegram alert verified in production. All builds passing on Vercel Pro. Firestore data verified via REST API. Full audit completed: Contacts, Projects, Buildings, Floors, Units, Parking, Storage.
notes: Vercel Pro plan activated ($20/mo). Build command: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192. 17+ files changed across session. Comprehensive audit found 9 bugs, all fixed.

commits.message: feat(telemetry): production error monitoring via Telegram alerts
fix(routing): resolve dynamic path conflict — contacts/[id] vs [contactId]
fix(projects): prevent description wipe when unlinking company
fix(projects): add missing license fields to auto-save payload
fix(projects): load issuingAuthority and issueDate from existing data
fix(contacts): clean up orphaned fields on contact type switch
fix(audit): 2 set/merge fixes + 4 delete cascade TODO markers
fix(storage): add price field to edit form
